ogTitle: Upper Pilton vs Upper Pinelands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Pilton and Upper Pinelands.
heading: Upper Pilton vs Upper Pinelands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Pilton, Queensland and Upper Pinelands, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Pilton has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Upper Pinelands (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Pilton or Upper Pinelands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Pilton has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Upper Pinelands scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Pilton scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Pinelands scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Pilton or Upper Pinelands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Pilton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
